<!--
Title must follow Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:, refactor:, test:) —
release-please uses it to decide the version bump.
-->

## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

The problem this solves or the motivation behind it.

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] Conventional Commit title
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed
